name: @shumoku/cli
description: Shumoku CLI for rendering network diagrams
author: konoe-akitoshi

scripts.build: bun build src/shumoku.ts --outfile dist/shumoku.js --target node --format esm --external @resvg/resvg-js
scripts.dev: bun build src/shumoku.ts --outfile dist/shumoku.js --target node --format esm --external @resvg/resvg-js --watch
